context: Tests whether the TabletopKit skill guides a core board-game setup while preserving current API availability boundaries.

checklist.name: Platform scope
checklist.description: States that TabletopKit is visionOS-only and distinguishes core visionOS 2.0+ APIs from later availability-gated APIs.

checklist.name: Core setup
checklist.description: Uses TableSetup and TabletopGame with table, seats, and equipment for the basic board-game model without requiring custom action registration for the core path.

checklist.name: Equipment model
checklist.description: Models pieces, cards, or dice as TabletopKit equipment and uses TabletopAction-style state changes rather than ad hoc shared mutable state.

checklist.name: Interaction configuration availability
checklist.description: Identifies TabletopInteraction.Configuration as a visionOS 2.2+ API and provides a safe fallback or availability check for visionOS 2.0/2.1 targets.

checklist.name: Avoids deprecated interaction APIs
checklist.description: Avoids recommending gesturePhase, setAllowedDestinations, or value.allowedDestinations as the primary current interaction API.

checklist.name: Custom API gate
checklist.description: Gates CustomAction, CustomEquipmentState, TableSetup.register(action:), TabletopAction.customAction, and direct custom addAction usage to visionOS 26.0+.

checklist.name: Seats and turns
checklist.description: Covers player seats, seat restrictions, or turn ownership in a way that fits TabletopKit's seating/action model.

checklist.name: RealityKit boundary
checklist.description: Uses RealityKit/EntityEquipment or render delegates for visual representation while keeping TabletopKit game state authoritative.

checklist.name: Multiplayer caveat
checklist.description: Explains that Group Activities/SharePlay are needed for multiplayer synchronization and that the simulator is limited for multiplayer testing.

checklist.name: Dice availability
checklist.description: Mentions that newer dice toss outcome helpers such as onTossStart, TossOutcome, and face(for:) require visionOS 26.0+ if used.
